privileged_info_summary: I discovered that the task is severely defective. Critical hook scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1), the evaluation script (verifier.py), and the underlying SQLite database data (food_database.db) are completely missing from the environment, rendering the task impossible to run and programmatically unscorable. The target output path explicitly matches the task description instructions.
